title: Economies with high inequality are concentrated in Latin America and Sub-Saharan Africa
subtitle: The map shows the Gini index of each economy using the most recent household survey data
source: Key Inequality Indicators, Poverty and Inequality Platform (version March 2026).
visdescription: The map shows the levels of inequality across the world.  Today, economies with high inequality (Gini index > 40) are concentrated in Latin America & the Caribbean and Sub-Saharan Africa.
